body.title: List primitives: list_push, list_pop, list_count (wrapping D095 lists table)
body.description: 3 primitives wrapping the existing D095 lists table. prim_list_push(list_name_key, value_key) -> append. prim_list_pop(list_name_key, out_key) -> take next item + remove. prim_list_count(list_name_key, out_key) -> length into basket. Named lists persist across heartbeat cycles — this is the durable queue substrate for multi-step programs. Thin wrappers on cortex.list_set/list_get/list_all.
